title: Write a shared-mode setup for a multi-process integration test
prompt: Write `test/my_app/integration/multi_process_test.exs` that legitimately requires shared mode because it spawns 3 distinct GenServer processes that each query Repo and none of them can be supervised under the test process (they're started globally by the application). Must: (1) `use MyApp.DataCase, async: false` with a comment explaining why, (2) `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.checkout(MyApp.Repo)` then `mode(MyApp.Repo, {:shared, self()})` in setup, (3) at least one test that exercises all 3 processes, (4) an `on_exit` callback that calls `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.mode(MyApp.Repo, :manual)` to reset mode for subsequent tests in other modules.
tier_rationale: Full shared-mode setup with mode reset — subtle detail often missed.
